name: Epitaph
description: Sevagoth's wrist-mounted sidearm fires a chilling slow-moving slab, guaranteed to slow enemies for easier marksmanship. Charge the shot to fire a punishing high-velocity, high critical chance slab that punches through barriers. Deals additional headshot damage in Sevagoth's hands.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Sevagoth's wrist-mounted sidearm fires a chilling slow-moving slab, guaranteed to slow enemies for easier marksmanship. Charge the shot to fire a punishing high-velocity, high critical chance slab that punches through barriers. Deals additional headshot damage in Sevagoth's hands.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Hotfix 30.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Epitaph moving around and being in random positions when swapping back and forth between Primary and Secondary weapons several times, when getting staggered or when throwing a Glaive while Dual Wielding.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed arm cannon type (Epitaph, Gammacor, Atomos) reticle area being blocked by a part of Zephyr Harrier's shoulder element.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.0.8 + 30.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Wisp not raising her arm when firing the Epitaph.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.7
patchlogs.changes:
The Epitaph Blueprint is now tradeable.
Added updated wrist-mounted weapon animations (ie Gammacor, Epitaph, Atomos, etc).
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Lavos' armbands blocking view while aiming down sights with wrist mounted secondary weapons (Epitaph notably).

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed ability to equip the Synth Charge Mod to Epitaph. 
Epitaph does not meet the magazine size requirement for Synth Charge.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes:
Earth Proxima Void Storm Rewards: Notable rewards in addition to your Relic items include pieces of Sevagoth’s Signature Sidearm ‘Epitaph’!
Venus Proxima Void Storm Rewards: Notable rewards in addition to your Relic items include pieces of Sevagoth’s Signature Sidearm ‘Epitaph’!
Saturn Proxima Void Storm Rewards: Notable rewards in addition to your Relic items include pieces of Sevagoth’s Signature Sidearm ‘Epitaph’.
Purchase in the ingame Market or earn Epitaph Blueprint and Components from Void Storm drop tables.
Put the fear of the Void into your foes with Sevagoth, the reaper of souls. Collection includes Sevagoth, Sevagoth Lucifuge helmet, Epitaph sidearm, Vithil Syandana and 3 day Affinity and Credit boosters.
